meta.title: Rules - WaitWhat
meta.description: Rules and guidelines for all WaitWhat players.

sections.title: General Rules
rules: Be respectful to all players and staff members.
No hacking, cheating, or using unfair advantages.
No spamming or excessive use of caps lock.
Do not share personal information of others.

sections.title: Chat Rules
rules: No offensive language, racism, or harassment.

sections.title: Gameplay Rules
rules: No team griefing in team-based modes.
Report bugs instead of abusing them.

meta.title: About - WaitWhat
meta.description: Learn more about WaitWhat, our team, and our journey.

about.title: About Us
about.description: WaitWhat was founded with a simple goal: to create the best Minecraft minigame experience for players around the world. Our dedicated team works tirelessly to bring you new features, game modes, and events.
